expectations.evidence: Without the skill, naive Claude would not know which ADR files to load (openspec/architecture/ directory, dutch-gov-architecture-standards.md, nlgov-api-design-rules.md, bio2-security-checklist.md). It might read whatever files it finds but without a systematic loading protocol.

Naive Claude can perform a general architectural review (thin controller, service layer, DI). It has general knowledge of good architecture patterns. However, Conduction-specific constraints (OpenRegister integration, @conduction/nextcloud-vue library, Dutch gov NORA/GEMMA compliance) would be missed.

Without the skill, naive Claude does not know the OpenSpec rules or which spec files to check (nextcloud-app/spec.md, api-patterns/spec.md). It would not check delta spec compliance, review the artifact chain, or assess design against shared specs.

General architectural review by Claude would suggest improvements. However, suggestions would be based on general software engineering knowledge, not Conduction-specific patterns, Dutch gov standards, or the established ADR decisions.

notes: General architecture review is a Claude capability; Conduction-specific ADR loading, OpenSpec compliance, and Dutch government standards are skill-specific. Without the skill, the review would miss the Conduction/Dutch-gov-specific architectural constraints.
